title: stemonoporus gardneri
intro: Stemonoporus gardneri is a species of plant in the family Stemonuraceae, commonly known as a deciduous tree native to Sri Lanka. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stemonoporus gardneri include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Stemonoporus gardneri include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams for medicinal purposes.
